title: Crunchy Japanese Crumble Potatoes
description: A crispy, savory, and aromatic side dish or main course, featuring Japanese flavors and textures.
instructions: Peel and thinly slice the potatoes.
In a bowl, mix together the sliced potatoes, green onions, and soy sauce.
Transfer the potato mixture to a baking dish.
Sprinkle the panko breadcrumbs evenly over the potatoes.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 5-7 minutes before serving.
